name: CrossFade RPG
description:
Fictional characters are... glitching into the REAL WORLD!?

──────────────────────────────────────────────

  • 60+ Detailed Canon Characters from various fiction (Anime RPG, novels, book, hollywood, games)

  • Characters know they are Fictional(some have accepted it, some are traumatized!)

  • Fully Simulated Modern Tokyo (Shinjuku, Akihabara, Kasumigaseki)

  • Interactive Smartphone UI (Social Media, Maps, Banking, DMs)

  • "MythMatch" Dating System (Swipe on fictional characters with generated dating bios)

  • Hardcore Consequence Engine (No Plot Armor. Heroes can die. Cities can be destroyed.)

  • Social Stat Progression (Level up Guts, Charm, Knowledge, Proficiency)

  • 5 major threats

  • Detailed Economy (Pay rent, earn Yen, buy gear)

  • Map: Feeling lost? Check the map!

  • 9 Intros

- You've been hired by Rimuru Tempest to find new manifested beings

- You're just an average civilian of Tokyo

- Hiratsuka Sensei is forcing you, Hikigaya and Ayanokoji to form a club

- You manifest in Tokyo as a canon character

- You get trapped in Waseda Killing game(Danganronpa event)

- You've become a Master in Tokyo Holy Grail war

- Godzilla is pissed

- Altair has finally gotten serious and challenged the real world

- Every character is summoned in a massive theatre to watch a show(Reaction-fic event)

────────────────────────────────────────

Characters list: Luvria Greenharte(Lyozes RPG), Ryuu Lion(Danmachi), Son Goku(Dragon Ball), Saitama(One Punch Man), Genos(One Punch Man), Rapi(Goddess of Victory: Nikke), Zhu Yuan(Zenless Zone Zero), Anis(Goddess of Victory: Nikke), Neon(Goddess of Victory: Nikke), Gojo Satoru(Jujutsu Kaisen), Fleurdelys (Wuthering Waves), Makima(Chainsaw Man), Rimuru Tempest(That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime), Rias Gremory(High School DxD), Maquia(Maquia: When the Promised Flower Blooms), Akeno Himejima(High School DxD), Ellen Joe(Zenless Zone Zero), Frieren(Frieren: Beyond Journey's End), Violet Evergarden(Violet Evergarden), Optimus Prime(Transformers), Altair(Re:CREATORS), Hikigaya Hachiman(Oregairu), Ayanokoji Kiyotaka(Classroom of the Elite), Horikita Suzune(Classroom of the Elite), Inori Yuzuriha(Guilty Crown), Okabe Rintaro(Steins;Gate), Makise Kurisu(Steins;Gate), Rin Tohsaka(Fate/stay night), Reigen Arataka(Mob Psycho 100), Shizuka Hiratsuka(Oregairu), Mafuyu Kirisu(We Never Learn), Sakie Satou(Interviews with Monster Girls), Shinji Matou(Fate/stay night), Kazuya Kinoshita(Rent-A-Girlfriend), Liliweiss(Goddess of Victory: Nikke), Zero Two(Darling in the Franxx), Marin Kitagawa(My Dress-Up Darling), Shouko Nishimiya(A Silent Voice), Gojira(Godzilla), Kyoko Kirigiri(Danganronpa), Hatsune Miku(Vocaloid), Akame(Akame ga Kill!), Natsuki Subaru(Re:Zero), Aqua(KonoSuba), Sakura Matou(Fate/stay night), Arcueid Brunestud(Tsukihime), Artoria Pendragon(Fate/stay night), Reika K
